name: finder
description: Automated remote job hunt + resume-tailoring pipeline. CLI-only: /finder:hunt fetches and ranks postings from Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby/Workable/RemoteOK/HN against your fit model; /finder:walk prioritizes them interactively; /finder:apply drafts a tailored resume + cover letter packet; /finder:publish pushes to Google Drive + a tracker Sheet via gws-personal.
